codeReview.summary: Clean refactor that isolates the start() function into a separate main.ts entrypoint file. server.ts now only exports buildApp() without calling start() at module level, preventing port conflicts during vitest runs. Package.json dev/start scripts correctly updated to use the new entrypoint. All 120 tests pass with exit code 0.

summary: Review complete. The fix correctly separates the server startup logic from the buildApp() export, resolving the vitest port conflict issue. No blocking issues, no convention deviations.
